escalation_summary.title: Unresolved issue
escalation_summary.description: The steps so far have not resolved this issue. Here is a summary of what was tried. You can run enhanced diagnostics to gather more information, or export a report.

offer_enhanced_diagnostics.title: Check enhanced diagnostics availability
offer_enhanced_diagnostics.description: Checking whether enhanced diagnostics can be run for additional information.

run_enhanced_diagnostics.title: Run enhanced diagnostics
run_enhanced_diagnostics.description: Enable a targeted WINEDEBUG preset to capture detailed debug output on the next launch. This will produce more verbose logs for analysis.

reclassify_after_enhanced.title: Re-analyze with enhanced logs
reclassify_after_enhanced.description: Analyzing the enhanced debug output for additional diagnostic patterns.

resolved.title: Issue identified
resolved.description: Enhanced diagnostics revealed additional information. Review the findings and consider restarting the troubleshooting flow with this new evidence.

export_bundle.title: Export diagnostic report
export_bundle.description: Export a comprehensive diagnostic bundle including all findings, attempted fixes, environment details, and relevant logs. This report can be shared for further analysis.

open_support_draft.title: Open support issue draft
open_support_draft.description: Open a pre-filled support issue draft with the exported diagnostic bundle path and a summary of everything that was tried.
